channel.title: TonForce Blog
channel.description: News and updates from the TonForce decentralized matrix platform

item.title: TonForce v4 launched on TON Mainnet
item.description: Next-generation contract with enhanced security, internal technical review passed, available right now.

item.title: How the 3×8 matrix works in TonForce
item.description: Simple and clear explanation of the matrix structure mechanics and the 4-level-deep referral program.

item.title: Technical contract review: results
item.description: Complete TonForce v4 security analysis finished. All 9 key checks passed successfully.
